name: Public Sector & Government Agencies (Germany)
description: Federal, state, and municipal government agencies in Germany with sovereign cloud and data residency requirements.

tam.description: Total German public sector IT spending
tam.source: LLM estimate based on Bitkom/BMI data: German public sector IT spend ~EUR 15B annually across federal, state, and municipal levels

sam.description: Cloud infrastructure and sovereign cloud services for German government
sam.source: LLM estimate: ~16% of public sector IT spend shifting to cloud, filtered to infrastructure/platform services requiring sovereign cloud capabilities and BSI compliance

som.description: 8 major agency contracts x EUR 7.5M avg ACV in 3 years
som.source: Bottom-up estimate: T-Systems has existing public sector presence via Telekom/DTAG framework contracts; can win 6-10 sovereign cloud mandates at EUR 5-10M ACV each
